message:
fix: add missing bonusPoints to REWARDS_FALLBACK (#5806)

PR #5798 added bonusPoints to RewardsContextType but didn't update
REWARDS_FALLBACK, breaking the build with TS2741.

Fixes #5800

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
